mapper.sql: select d.dept_id, d.pid, d.sub_count, d.name, d.dept_sort, d.enabled, d.create_by, d.update_by, d.create_time, d.update_time, d.type, p.name as parent_name from yn_wx_dept d left join yn_wx_dept p on p.dept_id = d.pid
mapper.insert: insert into yn_wx_dept(pid, sub_count, name, dept_sort, enabled, create_by, create_time, type) values(#{pid}, '0', #{name}, #{deptSort}, #{enabled}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{type})
mapper.delete: delete from yn_wx_dept where dept_id in #{deptId}
mapper.select: select count(1) from yn_wx_dept where pid = #{pid}
mapper.update: update yn_wx_dept set sub_count = (select count(1) from (select dept_id from yn_wx_dept where pid = #{deptId}) t) where dept_id = #{deptId}
